diagrams.title: Eigenvector Direction Invariance
diagrams.description: Shows how eigenvector v when transformed by matrix A only changes in magnitude (scale λ), not direction. Arrow points same direction after transformation.
diagrams.purpose: Visualize that eigenvector is unchanged in direction by the linear transformation

diagrams.title: Characteristic Equation Flow
diagrams.description: Step-by-step process to find eigenvalues: Start with matrix A, subtract λI, take determinant, set equals zero, solve for λ
diagrams.purpose: Remember the systematic procedure for finding eigenvalues

diagrams.title: Diagonalization Process
diagrams.description: Shows transformation from original basis to eigenbasis: A in standard basis → P⁻¹ transforms to eigenbasis → D (diagonal) → P transforms back
diagrams.purpose: Understand how diagonalization simplifies matrix operations

diagrams.title: Eigenspace Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows eigenspace for eigenvalue λ as null space of (A-λI), showing geometric multiplicity as dimension of this subspace
diagrams.purpose: Visualize eigenspace as solution space and understand geometric multiplicity
